translations.es: Trabajo en la oficina de alquileres.
translations.fr: Je travaille au service de location.
translations.pt: Eu trabalho no setor de aluguel.
translations.vi: Tôi làm ở bộ phận cho thuê.
translations.hi: मैं किराए के विभाग में काम करता हूँ.
translations.ja: 賃貸部門で働いています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular.
Preposition governing dative here; marks a locative phrase.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; agrees with 'Vermietung' after 'in'.
Noun, feminine; here dative singular as object of 'in' (department/process of renting).

sentences.target: Die Vermietung braucht heute noch deine Unterlagen.
sentences.reading: /diː fɛɐ̯ˈmiːtʊŋ bʁaʊ̯xt ˈhɔʏ̯tə nɔx ˈdaɪ̯nə ˈʊntɐˌlaːɡn̩/

translations.de: Die Vermietung braucht heute noch deine Unterlagen.
translations.ipa: /diː fɛɐ̯ˈmiːtʊŋ bʁaʊ̯xt ˈhɔʏ̯tə nɔx ˈdaɪ̯nə ˈʊntɐˌlaːɡn̩/
translations.en: The rental office still needs your documents today.
translations.es: La oficina de alquileres todavía necesita tus documentos hoy.
translations.fr: Le service de location a encore besoin de tes documents aujourd’hui.
translations.it: L'ufficio affitti ha ancora bisogno dei tuoi documenti oggi.
translations.ko: 임대팀은 오늘 네 서류가 아직 필요해.
translations.zh-Hans: 租赁部门今天还需要你的材料。
translations.yue: 租賃部今日仲需要你啲文件。
translations.ru: Отделу аренды сегодня ещё нужны твои документы.
translations.pt: O setor de aluguel ainda precisa dos seus documentos hoje.
translations.he: מחלקת ההשכרה עדיין צריכה את המסמכים שלך היום.
translations.tr: Kiralama bölümü bugün hâlâ belgelerine ihtiyaç duyuyor.
translations.vi: Bộ phận cho thuê hôm nay vẫn cần hồ sơ của bạn.
translations.ar: قسم التأجير لا يزال بحاجة إلى مستنداتك اليوم.
translations.nl: De verhuur heeft je documenten vandaag nog nodig.
translations.uk: Відділу оренди сьогодні ще потрібні твої документи.
translations.hu: A bérleti irodának ma még kellenek az irataid.
translations.hi: किराए के विभाग को आज भी तुम्हारे दस्तावेज़ों की ज़रूरत है.
translations.pl: Dział najmu wciąż potrzebuje dziś twoich dokumentów.
translations.el: Το τμήμα ενοικιάσεων χρειάζεται ακόμα τα έγγραφά σου σήμερα.
translations.nb: Utleiekontoret trenger fortsatt dokumentene dine i dag.
translations.id: Bagian penyewaan masih membutuhkan dokumenmu hari ini.
translations.sv: Uthyrningen behöver fortfarande dina papper i dag.
translations.ro: Departamentul de închirieri are încă nevoie de documentele tale astăzi.
translations.cs: Oddělení pronájmu dnes ještě potřebuje tvoje dokumenty.
translations.da: Udlejningen har stadig brug for dine dokumenter i dag.
translations.ja: 賃貸部門は今日もあなたの書類が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; marks the subject.
Noun, feminine; nominative singular as subject (often: the rental department).
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes an accusative object.
Temporal adverb; sets the time frame.
Adverb modifying the predicate; indicates continuation ('still/yet').
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular informal; accusative plural agreeing with 'Unterlagen'.
Common noun, plural; accusative plural as the direct object of 'braucht'.

sentences.target: Ich frage bei der Vermietung nach Preisen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə baɪ̯ deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈmiːtʊŋ naːx ˈpʁaɪ̯zn̩/

translations.de: Ich frage bei der Vermietung nach Preisen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə baɪ̯ deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈmiːtʊŋ naːx ˈpʁaɪ̯zn̩/
translations.en: I ask at the rental desk about prices.
translations.es: Pregunto por los precios en la oficina de alquileres.
translations.fr: Je demande les tarifs au service de location.
translations.ru: Я спрашиваю в отделе аренды о ценах.
translations.pt: Pergunto sobre os preços no setor de aluguel.
translations.he: אני שואל על מחירים במחלקת ההשכרה.
translations.vi: Tôi hỏi giá ở bộ phận cho thuê.
translations.ar: أسأل عن الأسعار في قسم التأجير.
translations.nl: Ik vraag bij de verhuur naar de prijzen.
translations.uk: Я запитую у відділі оренди про ціни.
translations.hu: A bérleti irodában az árakról érdeklődöm.
translations.hi: मैं किराए के विभाग में दाम पूछता हूँ.
translations.pl: Pytam w dziale najmu o ceny.
translations.el: Ρωτάω για τις τιμές στο τμήμα ενοικιάσεων.
translations.nb: Jeg spør om priser på utleiekontoret.
translations.id: Saya tanya harga di bagian penyewaan.
translations.sv: Jag frågar om priser hos uthyrningen.
translations.ro: Întreb de prețuri la departamentul de închirieri.
translations.cs: Ptám se na ceny na oddělení pronájmu.
translations.da: Jeg spørger om priser i udlejningen.
translations.ja: 賃貸部門で料金を聞きます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular.
Preposition governing dative; indicates location/organization addressed.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; required by 'bei'.
Noun, feminine; dative singular as object of 'bei' (the rental department/office).
Preposition governing dative; expresses topic ('about/for').
Common noun, dative plural as complement of 'nach'.

translations.en: The apartment is up for rent.
translations.ja: そのアパートは賃貸に出ています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; marks the subject.
Noun, feminine; nominative singular as subject.
Intransitive verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; here in a set phrase indicating availability.
Preposition 'zu' fused with article 'der' (feminine dative singular); forms the fixed expression 'zur Vermietung' ('for rent').
Noun, feminine; dative singular governed by 'zu(r)'.
